name: siterelay
description: Inspect browser-captured components, typography, assets, animations, and pages in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Bring exact browser captures into Codex.
interface.longDescription: SiteRelay securely connects Codex to locally captured components and pages, including rendered DOM, computed styles, responsive screenshots, typography, assets, interaction states, animations, reconstruction, and visual-difference verification.
interface.defaultPrompt: Inspect my latest SiteRelay browser capture and explain what was captured before making changes.
